subcodes.title: Words spoken in Jun. 1911 in Egypt
subcodes.first_line: Asceticism is not necessary. A soul grows by the exercise of human virtues and the observance of human morals
subcodes.subjects: @monasticism; asceticism, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
